ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( OR(TEXT(People_EB_Champion_Skill__c) == '0', TEXT(People_EB_Champion_Will__c) == '0') , TEXT(People_EB_Champion_Skill__c) != TEXT(People_EB_Champion_Will__c), false)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot select different values for People (EB / Champion) Skill and Will if either one value is 0 - Not applicable.
